<!--
Thanks for contributing to MCPmed! Please fill out this template so reviewers can
evaluate your change quickly. Delete sections that are not relevant.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what changes and why. Link any related issue with "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (would cause existing users to adjust their setup)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] CI / tooling / refactor (no user-visible behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](https://github.com/MCPmed/.github/blob/main/.github/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `black --check .` pass locally (Python repos).
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally, or I have explained why tests could not be added.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests that cover my change.
- [ ] I have updated the `README.md` and/or docs if user-visible behavior changed.
- [ ] I have added an entry to `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]`.
- [ ] My commits follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) style.

## How was this tested?

<!--
Describe the tests you ran, the environment, and any fixtures or mocks involved.
If this PR touches an MCP tool, include the exact tool call you used to verify it
and the response you got.
-->

## Screenshots / tool output (if applicable)

<!-- Paste relevant MCP `list_tools` output, server logs, or screenshots. -->

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: tricky areas, open questions, follow-up work. -->
